CustomField.description: Campaign Member Status value assigned when an Opportunity with a Primary Campaign Source reaches Closed/Won. Used by Automatic Campaign Member Management. If blank, NPPatch defaults to the first Responded status in the Campaign Member Status picklist. Must match an existing Campaign Member Status value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status for Campaign Members created from Closed/Won Opportunities. Leave blank to use the first Responded status.
CustomField.label: Campaign Member Responded Status
